title: rubus iricus
intro: Rubus iricus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Indian Raspberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a natural diuretic and to exhibit antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus iricus include its potential to help with digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of sore throats and coughs. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
